3141520.name: Escape Game: Galleria
3141520.description:
Escape Game: Galleria is a 3D HD enhanced First Person PC Version of Escape Game: Galleria previously released on iOS and Android.

You are trapped in a gallery.

Your goal is to escape from this place by exploring, collecting items, and solve the mysteries.

◆Control

W A S D + Mouse: Move & Look

E: Examine

Tap on the item icon twice to take a closer look.

While taking a closer look, sometimes you can examine more by tapping on the zoomed image.

Sometimes you can combine items by selecting another item and tap on the zoomed item image.

◆Features

・3D HD Graphics

・First Person Puzzle Solving Adventure

・7 Item Inventory

・Autosave

・Single Ending

◆Video Distribution Guidelines

・Posting and streaming videos are allowed without permission whether you are an individual or a corporation.

・Monetization only allowed using the features provided by video distribution platforms.

・Please include the game's name in the title of your video or stream and add a link to the Steam page in the description.

・We do not take any responsibilities for any issues occured by you posting videos or streaming this game.

・The contents of these guidelines may change without notice.
